title: Mr Sheen Multi-Surface Polish Original 250ml Pack of x 3 - packaging may vary
description: IDEABRIGHT LTD DESCRIPTION Mr Sheen Multi-Surface Polish Original 300ml Pack of 3 - 040446 x 3 - Mr Sheen Dust contains hidden nasties such as dead skin cells, dried saliva, and decaying insect waste. - These tiny particles are food for dust mites and make the surfaces in your home unclean. - Mr Sheen with Dust Trap Technology is proven to pick up more dust than using a cloth alone. - The unique formula acts like 1000’s of tiny magnets, attracting hidden nasties with every spray and because it’s Mr Sheen it’ll leave your surfaces with that rewarding smear-free shine and fresh-polish fragrance. image is for illustrative purpose only END OF IDEABRIGHT LTD DESCRIPTION
